/usr/bin/c++  -O0 -Wno-unused-parameter  -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--gc-sections -fuse-ld=gold CMakeFiles/test_imu_handler.dir/unit/imu_handler_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_imu_handler.dir/__/src/application/imu_handler/imu_handler.c.o CMakeFiles/test_imu_handler.dir/__/src/common/math/math-algebra3d.c.o -o test_imu_handler  libmocks.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a libCMSISDSP.a -lgcov ../lib/libgtest.a
